title: Immunoperoxidase detection of human alpha-synuclein in mouse brain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7qqi5","text":"This protocol is designed for detecting human alpha-synuclein (Abcam, RRID:AB_2537217, MJFR1). Tissues stained with this protocol include 35 μm free-floating mouse brain sections. All tissues were from mice perfused with 4% PFA. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":228,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"1ln7m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tex_formula","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"formula":"","guid":"","id":0}}}}
steps: Wash tissue slices in tris-buffer saline (TBS: 0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) for 10 minutes. Repeat x3.
Incubate in blocking buffer (5% goat serum, 2% BSA, 0.5% triton X-100 in TBS) for 1 hour at room temperature.
Wash tissue slices in TBS-T (TBS+ 0.25% Triton x-100) for 10 minutes. Repeat x3.
Incubate in goat anti-rabbit biotinylated secondary antibody at 1:250 dilution in 50% blocking buffer for 1 hour at room temperature.
Wash tissue slices in TBS-T(TBS+ 0.25% Triton X-100) for 10 minutes. Repeat x 2.
Incubate 1 hour with ABC complex. ABC complex to be prepared 30 min prior to use.
Wash tissue slices in TBS-T(TBS+ 0.25% Triton X-100) for 10 minutes. Repeat x 2.
Incubate with anti-human-alpha-synuclein primary antibody (RRID:AB_2537217) at 1:5000 dilution in 50% blocking solution for 24 hours at room temperature .
Incubate in in 10% Methanol + 3% H2O2 in TBS for 20 min at room temperature
Wash tissue slices in TBS (0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) for 10 minutes.
Wash tissue slices in tris-buffer saline (TBS: 0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) for 10 minutes. Repeat x3.
Wash tissue slices in TBS (0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) for 10 minutes.
Stain with the peroxidase chormogen diaminobenzidine
Wash tissue slices in TBS (0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) for 10 minutes. Repeat X 3.
creator: Pietro La Vitola
